user_query:
Create a self-contained "Sketch Board Enablement Kit" for our devtools team.

Read these inputs for context and constraints:
- input/team_profile.json
- input/policies.yaml

Deliverables (write all outputs under output/kit/):
1) quickstart.md — a tailored quick start for our team. Include a section titled "First Steps" with the four items from the quickstart reference, preserving their exact phrasing:
- Run the hello-world example
- Review the default configuration
- Try a simple real-world task
- Explore available commands and options

2) migration_plan.md — include a section titled "Pre-Migration Checklist" using exactly the five checkbox items from the migration reference (use "- [ ] " checkbox formatting and preserve the exact wording):
- [ ] Current system fully documented
- [ ] Complete backup taken and verified
- [ ] Target environment prepared
- [ ] Rollback plan documented
- [ ] Stakeholders notified
Also include a section titled "Migration Steps" listing the eight migration steps from the reference, numbered 1–8 and preserving their exact phrasing:
1. Prepare target environment
2. Export data from source
3. Transform data if needed
4. Import to target
5. Verify data integrity
6. Update configurations
7. Test all functionality
8. Switch traffic / go live

3) security_checklist.md — include three sections with these exact titles: "Authentication & Authorization", "Data Protection", and "Network Security". Under each section, include at least the four bullet points from the security reference (preserve their phrasing) and incorporate our policies where relevant (e.g., multi-factor authentication, least privilege, no hardcoded credentials, encryption in transit and at rest, documentation requirements).

4) troubleshooting.md — cover the four "Common Errors" from the debugging reference: "Connection refused", "Permission denied", "Timeout", and "Invalid input". For each error, add a short "Diagnosis:" and "Fix:" tailored to our team profile and policies.

5) performance.md — include a section titled "Optimization Strategies" with the five items from the performance reference, preserving their exact phrasing: Caching, Batching, Indexing, Compression, Parallel Processing.

6) index.json — a summary describing each deliverable with objects containing: id (one of quickstart, migration_plan, security_checklist, troubleshooting, performance), path (relative path to the file under output/kit/), and includes (an array of the required exact phrases included in that file). At minimum, ensure: 
- quickstart includes the four "First Steps" phrases
- migration_plan includes the five Pre-Migration Checklist items
- security_checklist includes the three section titles and "multi-factor authentication"
- troubleshooting includes the four error names
- performance includes the five strategy names

Ensure every file is clear, actionable, and tailored to the team profile and policies.
